allow: Bash(do sed -i.bak 's/bg-primary-darkAlt/bg-white/g' "$file" sed -i.bak 's/bg-primary-dark/bg-primary-light-alt/g' "$file" sed -i.bak 's/hover:bg-primary-dark/hover:bg-primary-light-alt/g' "$file" sed -i.bak 's/hover:text-accent-blue/hover:text-accent-teal-dark/g' "$file" sed -i.bak 's/text-primary-dark/text-white/g' "$file" rm "$file.bak" done)
